title: Brown Bear, Brown Bear Book

sections.heading: WHAT YOU'LL NEED TO PLAY
sections.middleText1:
two switches
record:
"what" on one switch 
"see" on the other
sections.middleText2: the book Brown Bear, Brown Bear, What Do You See? by Bill Martin Jr.

sections.heading: HOW TO PLAY
sections.body:
1. Use switches to complete repeated lines of Brown Bear, Brown Bear. 
2. Begin reading the book. 
3. Model switch use on the first repeated line "brown bear, brown bear (what) do you (see)?"
4. Continue reading and pause so the switch user can fill in the gap.

tooltipText: Use 2 switches to say the repeated line in the book
